line.token: 'List tasks assigned to the current user'
'Get task counts by status for the current user'
'Create a task (requires can_create on the module)'
'Forbidden: you lack can_create on this module'

'Forbidden: you lack can_update on this module'
'List tasks grouped by status for Kanban view'
'Forbidden: you lack can_delete on this module'
